/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER OLIVER LIM(CALLED OUT OF ORDER)/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD SERGEANT MATTHEW DUDLEY/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #8 IS ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE,/EXHMA: DEFENSE B, 2-PAGE COLD SHOW FORM/EXHMA: DEFENSE C, COPY OF STILL IMAGE/EXHMA: DEFENSE D, 2-PAGE COLD SHOW FORM/EXHMA: DEFENSE E, COLOR PHOTO OF A MALE/EXHMA: DEFENSE F, COLOR PHOTO OF A MALE/EXHMA: DEFENSE G, COLOR PHOTO OF A MALE/871D:1, 2, 3,4 & 5/X:COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE-NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY OF COMMITTING THE CRIME OF 487(A)PC AS A MISDEMEANOR IN COUNT 2 AND CERTIFIES THE CHARGE TO SUPERIOR COURT,/X:COURT ALSO FINDS THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE-NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY OF COMMITTING THE CRIME OF 496(A) AS A MISDEMEANOR AND CERTIFIES THE CHARGETO SUPERIOR COURT,/SHER/BAIL:100,000/CTORD:EM TERMINATED/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED KEPT IN CLERK'S OFFICE (ROOM 101) PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON INFORMATION/DOP/
